text_col.text_content: {"text":"show me heatmap of Region Category and Profit \n","type":"text","content":{"text":"show me heatmap of Region Category and Profit \n"}}

{"text":"The heatmap visualization reveals that the **Northeast region** has the highest profit in the **Electronics** category, amounting to  **$1,053,305**. Conversely, the **Northwest region** has the lowest profit in the **Music** category, with a value of  **$9,155**. 

Overall, the **Northeast** region leads in total profit across all categories, while the **Northwest** region lags behind. The **Electronics** category consistently generates the highest profits across all regions, whereas the **Music** category tends to generate the lowest profits. 

This data can help identify which regions and categories are performing well and which may need strategic adjustments.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"show me heatmap of Region Category and Profit 
","sql":"SELECT `Region@DESC`, `Category@DESC`, `Profit` AS `Profit` FROM `Interpretation` GROUP BY `Region@DESC`, {"text":"What is the average revenue per order by region?\n","type":"text","content":{"text":"What is the average revenue per order by region?\n"}}

{"text":"The average revenue per order varies slightly by region. The **Northwest** region has the highest average revenue per order at  **$53**. Most regions, including Central, Mid-Atlantic, South, Southwest, Northeast, and Southeast, have an average revenue per order of  **$52**. The **Web** region has the lowest average revenue per order at  **$51**. This indicates a relatively consistent average revenue per order across most regions, with only a small variation between the highest and lowest values.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"What is the average revenue per order by region?\n","sql":"SELECT `Region@DESC`, AVG(`Avg Revenue per Order`) AS `Average Revenue per Order` FROM `Interpretation` GROUP BY
